title: Storage, Persistence & Table Design
description: Object storage, databases, stateful workloads, schemas, partitioning, retention, backup

lessons.title: Why Storage Architecture Matters
lessons.description: Data gravity, durability guarantees, access patterns, cost tiers; retaining raw documents and model artifacts

lessons.title: Object Storage & Data Lake Foundations
lessons.description: S3-compatible object storage as the architectural primitive; MinIO as local/Kubernetes reference implementation

lessons.title: Databases on the Data Platform
lessons.description: PostgreSQL as primary reference; OLTP vs OLAP, connection pooling, replication, backup/restore, workload isolation

lessons.title: Schema Design, Partitioning & Retention
lessons.description: Relational and file-level schema design, indexing strategies, time-based partitioning, retention policies

lessons.title: Storage Decision Framework
lessons.description: Decision tree for block vs object vs database; managed vs self-hosted; document, search, and vector storage placement
